requirement_topic.en: Philippines Fire Code Review for BESS Sites
requirement_topic.zh: 菲律宾BESS场站消防规范审查
requirement_topic.zht: 菲律賓BESS場站消防規範審查

summary.en: BESS installations in the Philippines should be reviewed under the Revised Fire Code of the Philippines, local building and electrical permitting, and any site-specific Bureau of Fire Protection or local authority requirements. The fire package should address battery-room or container layout, separation, ventilation, detection, suppression, emergency shutdown, access, signage, and emergency response. Do not overclaim a single national BESS product fire certificate unless a project instrument specifically requires it.
summary.zh: 菲律宾BESS安装应按《菲律宾修订消防法》、当地建筑和电气许可，以及任何场站特定的消防局或地方主管机关要求进行审查。消防资料包应覆盖电池房或集装箱布局、间距、通风、探测、灭火、紧急停机、通道、标识和应急响应。除非项目文件明确要求，不应夸大为存在单一全国BESS产品消防证书。
summary.zht: 菲律賓BESS安裝應按《菲律賓修訂消防法》、當地建築和電氣許可，以及任何場站特定的消防局或地方主管機關要求進行審查。消防資料包應覆蓋電池房或集裝箱佈局、間距、通風、探測、滅火、緊急停機、通道、標識和應急響應。除非項目文件明確要求，不應誇大為存在單一全國BESS產品消防證書。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 9514, Revised Fire Code of the Philippines of 2008
Implementing rules and local fire-safety permit requirements
Project-specific BFP or local authority review

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and local project fire review for stationary energy storage. These documents may support hazard analysis but do not replace Philippines fire-code, building, electrical, or local authority review.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及当地项目消防审查管理固定式储能。这些文件可支持危险分析，但不能替代菲律宾消防规范、建筑、电气或地方主管机关审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及當地項目消防審查管理固定式儲能。這些文件可支持危險分析，但不能替代菲律賓消防規範、建築、電氣或地方主管機關審查。

gap.en: Prepare a Philippines site fire-safety file, not only a product datasheet. Include thermal runaway mitigation, battery management protections, fire detection and suppression design, ventilation or gas management, container spacing, emergency isolation, firefighting access, and local-language emergency procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备菲律宾场站消防安全资料，而不仅是产品数据表。资料应包括热失控缓解、BMS保护、火灾探测和灭火设计、通风或气体管理、集装箱间距、紧急隔离、消防通道和当地语言应急程序。
gap.zht: 應準備菲律賓場站消防安全資料，而不僅是產品數據表。資料應包括熱失控緩解、BMS保護、火災探測和滅火設計、通風或氣體管理、集裝箱間距、緊急隔離、消防通道和當地語言應急程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where fire-code, building, electrical, BFP, local authority, insurer, or project-owner review applies to the installation; product-level IEC or GB testing alone is not sufficient
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: Official Gazette of the Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippines BESS fire compliance is site and approval-route dependent. A China GB or IEC battery report should be used as supporting evidence, not as a replacement for fire-code review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾BESS消防合规取决于场站和审批路径。中国GB或IEC电池报告应作为支持证据，而不是替代消防规范审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓BESS消防合規取決於場站和審批路徑。中國GB或IEC電池報告應作為支持證據，而不是替代消防規範審查。
